scripts.kill:ports: sh -c 'for p in 3001 3002 3005 4000; do for pid in $(lsof -t -iTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; done; done; exit 0'
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000/api/v1 NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:4000 npm run build && npm run start:built
scripts.start:built: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:kpss: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,emerald "npm run dev:backend" "cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=kpss npx next dev -p 3002"
scripts.dev:yks: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,indigo "npm run dev:backend" "cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=yks_lgs npx next dev -p 3005"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,kpss,yks -c blue,emerald,indigo "npm run dev:backend" "cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=kpss npx next dev -p 3002" "cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=yks_lgs npx next dev -p 3005"
scripts.dev:restart: npm run kill:ports && npm run dev
scripts.dev:kpss:restart: npm run kill:ports && npm run dev:kpss
scripts.dev:yks:restart: npm run kill:ports && npm run dev:yks
scripts.dev:all:restart: npm run kill:ports && npm run dev:all
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.dev:alt: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend:alt" "npm run dev:frontend:alt"
scripts.dev:backend:alt: cd backend && API_PORT=4001 AI_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:5006 npm run dev
scripts.dev:ai:alt: cd ai-service && AI_PORT=5006 npm run dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
